assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions checking Istio compatibility matrix and states 'Newer Istio versions typically support multiple Kubernetes versions'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes explicit command '# Check Istio compatibility matrix first' in the upgrade section

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response clearly recommends 'Upgrade Istio First (Before GKE)' as step 1 and explains this approach is 'counterintuitive but often safer'

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response addresses webhook issues in the 'Common Gotchas' section with specific webhook certificate checks and emergency disable command

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: While the response mentions monitoring sidecar injection and proxy readiness, it doesn't explicitly explain that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected or emphasize verifying sidecar version matches

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring proxy readiness and mentions checking for proxy version consistency in the monitoring section and post-upgrade validation

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple relevant commands: 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', 'istioctl verify-install', and kubectl commands for monitoring proxy status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While the response mentions Envoy version compatibility as a gotcha, it doesn't explicitly warn about traffic disruption from control plane and sidecar version mismatches
